title: Mongolian language characteristics
first_prompt: Wha kind of language is Mongolian?
summary: Irwin was attempting to establish the fundamental linguistic and visual characteristics of the Mongolian language. The conversation began by defining Mongolian as an agglutinative, Mongolic language, before shifting focus to the script. The assistant then described the script as being written vertically in connected, flowing columns that run from top to bottom across the page.
